introSection: Donderstenen is a Zierer steel kiddie roller coaster located at Avonturenpark Hellendoorn in Hellendoorn, Overijssel, Netherlands.

sections.title: Etymology
sections.content: "Donderstenen" roughly translates to "Thunderstones" The name is a reference to both the theme of the ride and the targeted audience of the ride. "Donderstenen" is a Dutch version of the English word "Rascal", making the name a double play on words.

sections.title: Theme
sections.content: The theming is made by JoraVision.

fullText:
Donderstenen is a Zierer steel kiddie roller coaster located at Avonturenpark Hellendoorn in Hellendoorn, Overijssel, Netherlands.





"Donderstenen" roughly translates to "Thunderstones" The name is a reference to both the theme of the ride and the targeted audience of the ride. "Donderstenen" is a Dutch version of the English word "Rascal", making the name a double play on words.

The theming is made by JoraVision.
